_note: RFC-008 P2b golden corpus for scripts/validate-bp-contract.mjs (normative assertion 9, RFC L487). Dispatch: tests/test-validate-bp-contract.mjs stages each fixture into a git-initialized sandbox copy of the repo (review F1 — a bare fixture file can never satisfy the 0-set equality guard, so bp fixtures OVERLAY a canonical contract in the staged set; taxonomy/events fixtures are injected via --taxonomy/--events). The runner asserts each fail-fixture fails AT its attributed check (membership in violations[]), never merely exit 1.
_token_note: bp fixtures carry __LIVE_TAXONOMY_VERSION__/__LIVE_EVENTS_VERSION__ tokens replaced at staging time with hashes computed from the sandbox's effective documents (scripts/lib/version-hash.mjs) — committed digests would be a hand-typed-rot time bomb. The two stale-version fixtures keep all-zero digests on the field under test (schema-valid by pattern, never equal to a live hash).

asserts: attack-target-4: fourth classification gate (additionalProperties:false in gates)
attack-target-4: stop demoted per-label into gates (F2/F10)
attack-target-4: unknown root key (additionalProperties:false at root)
A1: interior id must equal filename stem
F8: taxonomy_version equality vs live computed hash
F37: events_version equality vs live computed hash
F1c/F9 stored non_overridable equals derived set
step-6 F-2: event-id uniqueness (events mirror of F1d)
F37 assertion-12 all three tier arms present
